'''Fernooda''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Dug/Legends|Dug]] follower of [[Ashaar Khorda]]. Fernooda acted as Khorda's intermediary, hiring [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] and [[Zam Wesell/Legends|Zam Wesell]] to retrieve the [[Infant of Shaa]] from [[Seylott/Legends|Seylott]]. Jango later strangled him on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] as he and Wesell foiled the cult's plot along with [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Yarael Poof/Legends|Yarael Poof]].
